rights_source: Made-in-China storefront operated by Shandong KAMA Automobile Manufacturing Co., Ltd. (manufacturer's own storefront) — registry entry ratified 2026-07-08
notes: Frame 1 of 6-image gallery (3/4-front studio shot). Retrieved at full-size via made-in-china '2f0j00' original-rendition prefix; discovery's ~1000px estimate was the platform derivative, not the original. Listing self-labels 'Model M67'; door badge reads 'M6'. Physical 'KAMA AUTO' front dealer plate present (OEM's own brand, part of the real unit — retained, not a platform watermark). No made-in-china watermark on the product.
